reasoning: From Vercel Labs (the just-bash authors), wterm ships a dedicated `@wterm/just-bash` package that wires just-bash into a full DOM-rendered terminal emulator. Vercel Labs authorship and the dedicated integration package make this notable.

reasoning: From the author of just-bash-py, this proof-of-concept wraps just-bash as a DSPy RLM code interpreter — a genuine integration with just-bash at its core.
